Name: PomponPlant
Notes: A bubbly plant that bounces the player off when they touch it. It can spawn items when hit by the player or with a Star Bit. If one of the players touch the plant with their pointer, it will swing around.

Obj_arg0.Name: Item Type
Obj_arg0.Description: The kind of item to spawn.

Obj_arg1.Name: Number of Items
Obj_arg1.Description: The number of items to spawn. Default is 1. Limit is 32 on Coins. Limit is 70 on Star Bits.
